inputs.price_source: Placeholder pre-refresh; marvin_cloud_refresh.py fetches market price
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $10,350M less capital spending on property, plant and equipment $5,261M, divided by 472.2M diluted weighted-average shares (10-K FY2025 filed 2026-02-25)
inputs.dividend_source: Cash dividends declared $6.00 per share in 2025; $2.811B paid (10-K)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses GAAP free cash flow (OCF minus PP&E capex). FY2025 included $412M business acquisitions and elevated growth capex; no project-impairment normalization required unlike peer APD.

bear.notes: Industrial recession; merchant volumes soften; leverage from buybacks pressures multiple toward global industrial peers

base.notes: Global gases oligopoly; on-site pricing and electronics/hydrogen demand; buybacks ~2% annual share reduction

bull.notes: Secular hydrogen and semiconductor fab demand accelerate; margin expansion in APAC; sustained $4B+ repurchases

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: PP&E and intangibles on balance sheet; no land-at-zero pattern (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating gases infrastructure; no royalty/land optionality

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: All four reportable segments profitable Q1 2026; Engineering lowest margin ~20% (10-Q Q1 2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: On-site take-or-pay and merchant contracts; 50% of RPO recognized within 12 months (10-K); modeled via core growth

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments $2,015M (10-K); joint ventures in hydrogen/engineering — not separately in Lawrence base

option_scan.question: Product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Electronics specialty gases and clean hydrogen already in segment revenue growth path

growth_explanation.mechanism: Global industrial gases oligopoly: on-site take-or-pay contracts plus merchant pricing pass-through; secular demand from semiconductors, healthcare, and clean hydrogen; per-share compounding via $4.6B FY2025 repurchases.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 MD&A; 10-Q Q1 2026 revenue +8% and diluted EPS +13% YoY

falsifiers.observation: Merchant pricing turns negative two consecutive fiscal years outside energy pass-through
Net debt rises above 3.0x EBITDA without commensurate buyback IRR
falsifiers.action: Downgrade dhando; cap exit multiple at 20x

falsifiers.observation: Global industrial production recession cuts volumes >5% two years
falsifiers.action: Move base toward bear; stance watch or trim

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
